name: X-Golf Holland
about: X-Golf Holland MI is a golf simulator venue offering 6 state-of-the-art simulators for play, training, and events. The facility provides a range of services including PGA instruction, leagues, corporate event hosting, and a full-service restaurant and bar. Pricing is per bay, per hour, with rates of $50-$60 depending on the day and discounts available for seniors, military, and first responders. Each simulator bay can accommodate up to 6 players per hour.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology combining camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors for accurate simulation
Comprehensive food and beverage options with a full bar and restaurant
Available PGA professional instruction and personalized coaching programs
Flexible booking system and accommodating group sizes

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen with a food and drink menu including shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas
Full bar service including beer by the glass, craft beer on tap, and cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: Combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors and advanced gaming software

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, though rental clubs are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, but BYOB policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes 1 hour for an individual player to play 18 holes. With more players, an additional hour per person may be needed depending on skill level.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages and accommodates all skill levels.
